name: C_base_features
description: This test workflow verifies the fundamental C language features implemented in the simple C compiler. This simple C compiler itself has been compiled from code generated by a machine learning model. The test begins by using Clang purely for preprocessing, generating a clean source file free of extra directives - pretest commands. Next, the custom 'simple C compiler' tool compiles that preprocessed file into ARM64 assembly - the test command, which is then assembled and linked back in Clang - posttest commands. The test program exercises operators, control flow statements, data structures, and other language constructs, returning a numeric exit code. By analyzing that exit code, developers can pinpoint exactly which features have succeeded or failed without relying on the standard C library.

commands: [[debug,result=0]]./feature_test arithmetic:5,2 relational:5,2 logical:1,0 bitwise:6,3 assignments:10 struct_union:3,4,10,3.14,65 pointers:10,2.0 enum_switch:0 loops:5,2,3 goto:5 conditional:5,3,10,20 comma:3,4 sizeof else:0,1,5 short_char:30000,100 other
